latestReleaseNote.title: Trust and pilot-surface refresh
latestReleaseNote.summary: Refreshed the live 1.2.3 family with signed-in end-of-run pilot locking, pilot and local-score visibility fixes, a last-life game-over runtime-freeze repair, cleaner build and dock framing, password visibility toggles, and broader shell and panel polish aimed at making the current line easier to trust while the next fidelity cycle takes shape.
